hero.subtitle: Design and ship clean, fast, elegant interfaces with a premium visual system and a modern product experience.
hero.footnote: No generic templates. Modern product sections ready to combine, animate, and ship to production.

workflow.title:
From wireframe to polished interface
in hours, not weeks.
workflow.subtitle: Combine ready-made blocks, tweak tokens, and ship product-ready UI kits without drowning in Figma files.
workflow.step1_desc: Pick spacing, style tokens and layout patterns from a curated design system.
workflow.step2_desc: Drop reusable components directly into your project. No config hell.
workflow.step3_desc: Deploy pixel-perfect interfaces with ready-to-use motion and interactions.

componentGallery.eyebrow: A KIT, NOT JUST A TEMPLATE
componentGallery.title: Craft full product experiences with ready-made UI blocks.
componentGallery.subtitle: Swap sections, tweak tokens, and keep everything on-brand without touching a design tool every single time.

ui4.msg1: Hey! The new components look amazing 🎉

useCases.title: Use NovaKit wherever clean, fast UI really matters.
useCases.case1Desc: Compose analytics views, settings areas, and billing pages that feel consistent across your product.
useCases.case2Desc: Give your ops and support teams interfaces that feel as polished as the public-facing product.
useCases.case3Desc: Reuse a dependable SvelteKit foundation on every engagement, while each brand still feels unique.
useCases.case4Desc: Bridge the gap between Figma and code with sections that mirror modern product UI patterns.

usecases.eyebrow: The UI toolkit that changes everything

superpowers.eyebrow: Explore NovaKit in a whole new way.
superpowers.title: Everyday superpowers for modern product interfaces.
superpowers.card1Desc: Typography, spacing, and radius scales that stay consistent from day one, without wrestling a massive design system.
superpowers.card2Desc: Scroll reveal, hover states, and polished micro-interactions are already wired and easy to tune.
superpowers.card3Desc: Sections designed like building blocks: hero, pricing, FAQ, and more, all fitting together without breaking layout rhythm.
superpowers.card4Desc: Runes-based state, actions, and TypeScript typing so developer experience feels as modern as the UI.
superpowers.card5Desc: Strong defaults for spacing and visual rhythm, with clean CSS you can adapt to your brand in minutes.
superpowers.card6Desc: Built for real products, not just portfolios: loading states, empty states, and error messaging included.

features.title: Designed for Modern Interfaces
features.subtitle: Production-ready components with polished aesthetics, modern performance, and a consistent visual experience across your product.

cards.cleanDesc: Build clean, modern interfaces with simple, reusable components.
cards.fastDesc: Svelte compiles your code for speed, so your UI stays fast by default.
cards.premiumDesc: Minimal visual style, expressive typography, and refined micro-interactions.
cards.customDesc: Adapt color, typography, and spacing with design tokens in seconds.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team and growth stage.
pricing.starterDesc: Perfect for side projects and early MVPs.
pricing.proDesc: The best plan for teams shipping production products.
pricing.teamsDesc: For product teams moving fast across multiple products.

testimonials.title: Start bringing balance back to your interface work.

quotes.q1: We moved from static marketing pages to complete SvelteKit flows in days. NovaKit gave us a consistent visual language without fighting Figma in every iteration.
quotes.q2: As a freelancer, I finally have a serious starting point. I reuse the same foundation across clients, while each project still feels unique through sections and tokens.
quotes.q3: Our product team can prototype new ideas directly in SvelteKit without waiting for hand-coded HTML every time. The micro-interactions feel right out of the box.
quotes.q4: Since migrating our marketing site to NovaKit, the team stopped saying 'we will build it tomorrow' and started saying 'we can ship it today 🚀'.
quotes.q5: We use it as the foundation for three different products and almost nobody notices. We swap tokens, logos, and copy, and it just works. It feels like a living design system ✨.
quotes.q6: Every sprint starts by cloning a NovaKit layout instead of reusing an old page. That alone saves hours of design debates 🙌.
quotes.q7: Our remote team shares landing screenshots in Slack like they are new Dribbble shots. The best part is that everything is live in production 😍.
quotes.q8: We built a lightweight design system on top of NovaKit and, for the first time, design and code move at the same speed. No more endless pixel-perfect loops 🧩.
quotes.q9: The client thought we hired an expensive agency. In reality, it was NovaKit layouts with a few brand customizations 😏.
quotes.q10: NovaKit lets us keep a coherent component library across product, marketing, and internal dashboards without duplicating work ⚙️.
quotes.q11: It feels like opening a mature app from day one. We only had to plug in our data and start iterating.
quotes.q12: We used to have four versions of the same button. Now everything comes from one kit, and support sends us hearts in Slack 💜.
quotes.q13: I never thought I would enjoy building tables and settings screens this much. NovaKit makes even routine screens feel premium 😅.
quotes.q14: We moved from 'do not touch that fragile view' to 'clone the NovaKit pattern and adapt it.' It is a completely different mindset 💡.
quotes.q15: Backend handoff is now just sharing components. Fewer tickets, fewer screenshots, and many more happy pull requests 🤝.
quotes.q16: Some motion details feel straight out of apps like Linear or Superlist. Best of all, the CSS stays clean and readable 👀.
quotes.q17: We turned a Figma prototype into a navigable demo in one afternoon. The sales team sent us a very enthusiastic THANK YOU 🔥.
quotes.q18: This landing let us validate our product messaging in days. We only changed copy and data, the design foundation was already there.
quotes.q19: Navigating NovaKit feels like the best modern productivity apps, while remaining pure Svelte code we fully control.
quotes.q20: This landing let us validate our product messaging in days. We only changed copy and data, while the design foundation was already done ✅.
quotes.q21: We handed it to marketing and they now create new pages on their own. I just review the pull request and smile 😎.
quotes.q22: NovaKit code is so clean that even our very detail-oriented CTO gave us an immediate green light 🧠.
quotes.q23: In investor demos, we used a landing built with NovaKit directly. Nobody asked about design quality, only about the roadmap. That says it all 💬.
quotes.q24: We connected NovaKit to our API and had a client mini-portal in one afternoon that looked polished for months ✨.
quotes.q25: The data team asked for 'something quick' to present metrics. We gave them a NovaKit dashboard and now they do not want anything else 📊.
quotes.q26: I love being able to open the landing repo, tweak a few props, and see real changes in minutes. Zero fear of breaking the design 💻.

deepDetails.eyebrow: Details that matter for product UI.
deepDetails.title: Move seamlessly from idea to shipped interface.
deepDetails.subtitle: NovaKit handles the details that shape great product UI: states, spacing, visual rhythm, and accessibility.

items.item2Text: Repeatable sections for pricing, onboarding, and in-product announcements.
items.item2Tag: Reuse patterns without losing brand personality
items.item3Text: Offline-friendly patterns for apps that cannot fail in low-connectivity scenarios.
items.item4Text: Widget-style cards ready for metrics, activity feeds, and operational views.
items.item4Tag: Blocks that feel like product UI
items.item5Text: Nested layouts designed for complex views without sacrificing clarity.
items.item5Tag: Complex under the hood, clear on the surface
items.item6Text: TypeScript and Svelte 5 runes for a modern developer workflow.
items.item6Tag: Developer experience and design in sync
items.item7Text: Clean integrations with REST and GraphQL APIs.
items.item8Text: Consistent loading, error, and empty states across the entire app.
items.item9Text: Smooth motion that keeps performance in check.
items.item10Text: Accessibility-first defaults: visible focus states, contrast, and semantic roles.
items.item11Text: Transactional email templates aligned with your product UI.
items.item12Text: Dark mode-ready components without rewriting your entire theme.
items.item13Text: Navigation patterns built for multi-team, multi-workspace products.
items.item14Text: Empty-state layouts that encourage action instead of dead ends.
items.item14Tag: Empty states that move users forward
items.item15Text: Suggested microcopy for CTAs, states, and product tooltips.

faqCta.subtitle: Stop building from scratch. NovaKit gives you everything you need to ship beautiful products in hours, not weeks.

footer.tagline: The last UI toolkit you will ever need.

dropzone.strongVideo: Drop a video here or click to upload
dropzone.strongImage: Drop an image here or click to upload
dropzone.strongAudio: Drop an audio file here or click to upload
dropzone.formatsVideo: Supported: MP4, MOV (Max: 150MB). Local biometric analysis.
dropzone.formatsImage: Supported: JPG, PNG (Max: 150MB). Local visual audit.
dropzone.formatsAudio: Supported: MP3, WAV, M4A/AAC, OGG (Max: 150MB). Local acoustic audit. You can also upload a video to extract its track.

text.hint: Paste text in the panel and click Analyze text.

link.body: Paste a link. For privacy, KRONOS does not download content—upload the file to analyze it.

empty.image: Drop a file to start the neural scan.
empty.audio: Drop an audio file (or a video to extract its track) to start the acoustic audit.
